summary: Comprehensive testing of iteration 21 features: Quick Meditation widget, How it Works section, Mobile Unit CTAs, Guided Meditation buttons on practice pages, and accessibility CSS. All 11 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 21 features fully tested. Quick Meditation widget, How it Works section, Mobile Unit CTAs, and Guided Meditation buttons on all practice pages verified working. Accessibility CSS (focus-visible, min-height 44px, reduced motion) confirmed present.
